question: Show the name of vehicles with no renting history.
sql: SELECT name FROM Vehicles WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT vehicles_id FROM Renting_history);

back_translation.intent: 查询未被租用的车辆名称
filters: id NOT IN (SELECT vehicles_id FROM Renting_history)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，原始问题要求显示没有租用记录的车辆名称，SQL反向翻译描述通过使用NOT IN子查询正确表达了这一意图。
